message:
✨ Add glob patterns and run URL feedback to /test-nightly (#1065)

* ✨ Add glob patterns and run URL feedback to /test-nightly

- Support glob patterns: `/test-nightly *-ocp`, `/test-nightly inference-scheduling-*`
- After triggering, poll for the actual workflow run URL and comment it back on the PR
- Single nightly shows a detail table with direct run link
- Multiple matches show a table of all triggered nightlies with run links
- Updated usage help to document pattern syntax

* Address Copilot review: fix branch race and run URL matching

- Include comment ID in temp branch name to prevent races when multiple
  /test-nightly commands run concurrently on the same PR
- Add head_sha filter to run URL discovery to avoid picking runs from
  concurrent dispatches (timestamp-only matching was ambiguous)

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
